title: Minecart Detector
description: Detects when a minecart passes over a specific point on a rail line. A detector rail emits a redstone signal (strength 15) when any minecart rests on it. Used in automatic rail switching, station stops, and cart dispatchers.

steps.title: Foundation and rail bed
steps.explanation: 3-wide, 1-deep stone base. The detector rail sits in the center (x=1); normal rails bookend it on x=0 and x=2 to keep the cart moving through.

steps.title: Rails
steps.explanation: Normal powered rail at (0,1,0) facing east-west. Detector rail at (1,1,0) — this is the sensor. Normal rail at (2,1,0). A minecart riding from x=0 to x=2 will pass over the detector rail and trigger it.

steps.title: Output wire and lamp
steps.explanation: Dust at (1,1,1) — placed adjacent to the detector rail (detector rails output on all sides at y=0 and adjacent blocks). Dust carries signal to lamp at (1,0,-1). When a minecart rides over (1,1,0), the lamp lights. Signal lasts while the cart is on the rail.
